evals.name: happy-path-aei-known-journal
evals.prompt: 我的 Research session 在 0_Research/，Algorithm session 在 Algorithm/20260104_multimodal-social-interaction/。我想把這篇論文投 Advanced Engineering Informatics。幫我開啟 journal writing session。
evals.expected_output: Session folder with fully populated step0_session_config.json matching the AEI cheatsheet. All 15 upstream artifacts resolved. critical_missing empty. User gets a concise summary and next-step pointer.

assertions.text: step0_session_config.json exists in session folder
Config target_journal == 'Advanced Engineering Informatics' and publisher == 'Elsevier'
Config word_limit == 8000 and citation_style uses elsarticle-num
Config section_structure contains all 7 sections (Abstract..Conclusion)
Config writing_order matches default Methods-first order
All 9 from_research artifacts resolved to non-null paths
All from_algorithm artifacts (incl. figures_dir) resolved to non-null paths
artifacts.critical_missing is an empty array
current_step == 0 and review_round == 0
Paths stored relative to project root (no absolute /Users/... paths)

evals.name: missing-critical-artifacts
evals.prompt: Start a new journal session. Research at FakeResearch/, Algorithm at FakeAlgo/partial-session/. Target journal: IEEE TNSRE. The folders are sparse. Proceed anyway and warn me about what's missing.
evals.expected_output: Session created with IEEE TNSRE specs from cheatsheet. critical_missing populated with each missing critical artifact, each with path_checked and suggested_command. User explicitly warned.

assertions.text: step0_session_config.json exists
Config target_journal references IEEE TNSRE and publisher == 'IEEE'
Config template references 'IEEEtran' and citation_style == 'IEEEtran'
artifacts.critical_missing is non-empty
critical_missing includes sota_review, gap_analysis, hypothesis
critical_missing includes ablation_matrix, analysis_summary, figure_catalog, experiment_report
Each critical_missing entry has path_checked field
Each critical_missing entry has suggested_command field
Present artifacts (references_bib, architecture_spec) are resolved to non-null paths
Summary explicitly warns user about missing artifacts

evals.name: unknown-journal-fallback
evals.prompt: Initialize journal session. Research: 0_Research/. Algorithm: Algorithm/20260104_multimodal-social-interaction/. I want to submit to 'Computers in Biology and Medicine' — not in your list.
evals.expected_output: Session created. Journal specs either pulled from step8_journal_recommendations.md, WebSearched, or flagged as unknown with explicit warnings. No silent fabrication.

assertions.text: step0_session_config.json exists
Config target_journal == 'Computers in Biology and Medicine'
All 9 from_research artifacts resolved
All from_algorithm artifacts resolved
artifacts.critical_missing is empty
publisher populated correctly or null with warning (not silently wrong)
word_limit plausible (6000-9000) or null with warning
Warning recorded if any journal field is unknown
Summary explains where journal specs came from
No silent fabrication of journal specs
